response.original_title: One Team: The Story of the Lewiston High School Blue Devils
response.overview: One Goal (Lewiston, Maine)  In a post-industrial Maine city still reeling from economic decline, an unlikely brotherhood forms on a soccer field. When Somali refugees — fleeing war, poverty and displacement — land in overwhelmingly white Lewiston, tensions run high. But Coach Mike McGraw sees something no one else does: that these kids, from six different countries, speak the same language when they play. What unfolds is a championship season that forces a divided town to finally look at itself differently.
response.title: One Team: The Story of the Lewiston High School Blue Devils
